questions.question: What is the planner's responsibility in a plan-execute agent?
options: To call the dispatcher on each step
To produce an ordered list of typed steps the executor will run
questions.explanation: Planner emits structured plans. The executor runs them. Mixing the two is the chain-of-thought trap this lesson is moving away from.
questions.question_zh: 在 plan-execute agent 里,planner 的职责是什么?
options_zh: 在每一步调用 dispatcher
产出一个有序的、结构化 step 列表,供 executor 运行
强制超时
处理 JSON-RPC 传输
questions.explanation_zh: Planner 输出结构化计划,executor 执行它。混在一起就是本节要摆脱的 chain-of-thought 陷阱。

questions.question: Why is expected_outcome part of the Step shape even though the executor does not check it?
options: Because the dispatcher uses it as a cache key
Because it gives the replanner and tracers a stated success condition to read
Because the model trains on it
questions.explanation: The replanner reads it when revising. The tracer renders it on the timeline. It is a human-readable contract on the step.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 expected_outcome 是 Step 形状的一部分,即便 executor 并不检查它?
options_zh: 因为 dispatcher 用它做 cache key
因为它给 replanner 与 tracer 提供一个可读的成功条件
因为 registry 要求它
因为模型在它上面训练
questions.explanation_zh: Replanner 在改写时读取它,tracer 在时间线上渲染它。它是 step 上人类可读的契约。

questions.question: When a step fails and the replanner returns a new plan, what does the executor emit on the event stream?
questions.explanation: plan.diff makes the revision visible. A silent rewrite is the bug we are avoiding.
questions.question_zh: 当一步失败、replanner 返回新计划后,executor 在事件流上发出什么?
options_zh: 什么也不发——replan 是静默的
session.complete,status=failed
plan.diff,带有 removed/added/revised 的 step id
tool.error,后接 session.start
questions.explanation_zh: plan.diff 让改写可见。静默改写正是要避免的 bug。

questions.question: Why have both max_steps and max_replans as separate budgets?
options: Because they measure different units. Steps cap total execution; replans cap how many times the planner is called.
Because the dispatcher rejects unbounded plans
questions.explanation: max_replans catches a planner that keeps returning the same broken plan. max_steps catches a runaway plan that keeps growing.
questions.question_zh: 为什么把 max_steps 与 max_replans 设成两个独立预算?
options_zh: 因为它们衡量不同的单位。Steps 限制总执行步数; replans 限制 planner 被调用的次数。
因为 asyncio 要求两者
因为 dispatcher 拒绝无界计划
因为 registry 计数 replan
questions.explanation_zh: max_replans 抓的是不停产出同一个坏计划的 planner。max_steps 抓的是不停膨胀的失控计划。

questions.question: Which reason is returned when the planner returns an empty list on the first call?
questions.explanation: No plan, no execution. The session ends with reason=no_plan and status=failed.
questions.question_zh: 当 planner 在第一次调用时返回空列表,会得到哪个 reason?
options_zh: step_budget
replan_budget
goal_met
no_plan
questions.explanation_zh: 没有计划就没有执行。会话结束,reason=no_plan,status=failed。

questions.question: What is in PlanDiff.revised?
options: Step ids that were in the old plan and are not in the new
Step ids in the new plan that were not in the old
Step ids whose tool_name or args changed between revisions
Step ids the planner asked to skip
questions.explanation: revised is the set of ids whose (tool_name, args) signature changed across the revision.
options_zh: 在旧计划里、不在新计划里的 step id
在新计划里、不在旧计划里的 step id
(tool_name 或 args) 在改写前后发生变化的 step id
planner 要求跳过的 step id
questions.explanation_zh: revised 是 (tool_name, args) 签名跨改写发生变化的 id 集合。

questions.question: When the executor exhausts max_replans, what is the resulting SessionResult.reason?
questions.explanation: replan_budget. The status is failed. History carries every step that ran, including the failures that triggered replans.
questions.question_zh: 当 executor 用尽 max_replans 时,SessionResult.reason 是什么?
options_zh: goal_met
step_budget
replan_budget
no_plan
questions.explanation_zh: replan_budget。状态是 failed。history 保留所有运行过的 step,包括触发 replan 的失败。
